name: python3-networkx
title: python3-networkx
summary: tool to create, manipulate and study complex networks (Python3)
description:
tool to create, manipulate and study complex networks (Python3)
NetworkX is a Python-based package for the creation, manipulation, and
study of the structure, dynamics, and functions of complex networks.
.
The structure of a graph or network is encoded in the edges (connections,
links, ties, arcs, bonds) between nodes (vertices, sites, actors). If
unqualified, by graph it's meant a simple undirected graph, i.e. no
self-loops and no multiple edges are allowed. By a network it's usually
meant a graph with weights (fields, properties) on nodes and/or edges.
.
The potential audience for NetworkX includes: mathematicians, physicists,
biologists, computer scientists, social scientists.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of NetworkX.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-networkx because tool to create, manipulate and study complex networks (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-networkx as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-networkx with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-networkx --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
